title: HubSpot CRM Search Request
description: Schema for a CRM search request body used with POST /crm/v3/objects/{objectType}/search. Supports complex filtering, sorting, and pagination of CRM object records.

filterGroups.description: An array of filter groups. Records matching ANY filter group will be included in the results (OR logic between groups). Within each filter group, ALL filters must match (AND logic within a group). Maximum 3 filter groups with up to 3 filters each.

sorts.description: An array of sort criteria to order the results. When multiple sort criteria are specified, they are applied in order.

query.description: A full-text search query string. When provided, returns records where any searchable default text property contains the query term. Can be combined with filterGroups for more specific searches.

properties.description: An array of property names to include in the response for each matching record. If not specified, a default set of properties is returned. Use this to request additional properties beyond the defaults.

items.description: A CRM property name to include in the response.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return in a single response. Defaults to 10 if not specified. Maximum value is 200.

after.description: The pagination cursor token from the previous response's paging.next.after field. Used to retrieve the next page of search results.

FilterGroup.description: A group of filter conditions. All filters within the group must match (AND logic). Filter groups themselves are combined with OR logic.

filters.description: An array of filter conditions, all of which must match (AND logic).

Filter.description: A single filter condition for a CRM property.

propertyName.description: The internal name of the CRM property to filter on.

operator.description: The comparison operator to use for the filter.

enumDescriptions.EQ: Equal to - property value exactly matches the specified value.
enumDescriptions.NEQ: Not equal to - property value does not match the specified value.
enumDescriptions.LT: Less than - property value is less than the specified value (numeric/date).
enumDescriptions.LTE: Less than or equal to - property value is less than or equal to the specified value.
enumDescriptions.GT: Greater than - property value is greater than the specified value (numeric/date).
enumDescriptions.GTE: Greater than or equal to - property value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
enumDescriptions.BETWEEN: Between - property value is between value and highValue (inclusive).
enumDescriptions.IN: In - property value is one of the values in the values array.
enumDescriptions.NOT_IN: Not in - property value is not in the values array.
enumDescriptions.HAS_PROPERTY: Has property - the property has any non-null value. No value needed.
enumDescriptions.NOT_HAS_PROPERTY: Not has property - the property is null or empty. No value needed.
enumDescriptions.CONTAINS_TOKEN: Contains token - text property contains the specified token (supports wildcard *).
enumDescriptions.NOT_CONTAINS_TOKEN: Not contains token - text property does not contain the specified token.

value.description: The value to compare against. Not required for HAS_PROPERTY and NOT_HAS_PROPERTY operators. For date properties, use Unix timestamp in milliseconds as a string.

highValue.description: The upper bound value for BETWEEN operator comparisons. Required when using the BETWEEN operator.

values.description: An array of values for IN and NOT_IN operator comparisons. Use this instead of value when using IN or NOT_IN operators.

Sort.description: A sort criterion for ordering search results.

propertyName.description: The name of the CRM property to sort results by.

direction.description: The direction to sort results. ASCENDING sorts from smallest/earliest to largest/latest. DESCENDING sorts from largest/latest to smallest/earliest.
